target_venue: Bulletin of the Australian Mathematical Society (BAustMS)

upstream: BAUSTMS-PREP-KSPSLQ-001 (2026-05-18) — submission package prepared; cover-letter.txt names 3 suggested reviewers + 1 open slot
EXPMATH-WITHDRAWAL-KSPSLQ-001 (2026-05-18) — withdrawal email drafted; gating BAustMS submission until confirmation
downstream: BAustMS OJS submission (operator action, dependent on both EXPMATH withdrawal confirmation AND adoption of the revised reviewer list emerging from this vetting)

per_reviewer_decisions.name: David H. Bailey
per_reviewer_decisions.blocking_filter: Filter B — direct BBC cluster membership (he is the lead 'Bailey' in 'Bailey-Borwein-Crandall')

per_reviewer_decisions.name: David J. Broadhurst
per_reviewer_decisions.blocking_filter: Filter B — direct two-author coauthorship with Bailey (Bailey-Broadhurst 2001, manuscript ref [3])

per_reviewer_decisions.name: Brigitte Vallée
per_reviewer_decisions.notes: Filter A structurally unverifiable from outside CUP (T&F 403); 24-month publication window slightly thin on surfaced items (operator may want a quick HAL check for additional 2024-2026 items).

for_R1_Bailey.primary: Yann Bugeaud (IRMA Strasbourg, FR) — CLEAN Filter B
for_R1_Bailey.alternate: Tanguy Rivoal (Institut Fourier Grenoble, FR) — YELLOW Filter B (2nd-degree to Borwein via Zudilin)

for_R2_Broadhurst.primary: Igor E. Shparlinski (UNSW Sydney, AU) — SOFT YELLOW Filter B (2013 Borwein memorial-volume co-edit); AU adds geographic diversity
for_R2_Broadhurst.alternate: Stéphane Fischler (Paris-Saclay, FR) — CLEAN Filter B; trades AU diversity for cleaner cluster posture

halt_or_partial_events: Stage 2 Filter A: T&F editorial board page (uexm20) returned HTTP 403 on direct fetch; Wayback no snapshot. Filter A for all 3 named reviewers rated UNVERIFIED-PROBABLE-PASS via secondary searches. Operator can choose to wait for board reachability before submission, or accept the probabilistic verdict (recommended).

Initial Bing-mediated synthesis returned a single hallucinated claim ('David Bailey is on the EM board') that was contradicted on follow-up. The contradiction is logged in reviewer-1-report.json under filter_A; final verdict is PROBABLE-PASS.
set_level_evaluation_summary: Set FAILS clustering check: Bailey and Broadhurst are direct coauthors (manuscript ref [3]). Geographic diversity is OK (USA, UK, FR — non-AU complete). Subfield mix is weak (2/3 PSLQ-algorithmics, 1/3 CF metric theory). Recommended replacement set {Vallée, Bugeaud, Shparlinski} balances better.

downstream_gate.rationale: BAustMS does not require suggested reviewers as a precondition for submission; they are at editor's discretion (cover letter says 'editorial office is of course free to ignore these suggestions'). The submission can technically proceed with the original list. However, presenting a list with 2 reviewers who are direct manuscript-cited coauthors and the cluster head and a clustering-failure within the set is a referee-process risk worth correcting before submission.
downstream_gate.operator_action: Revise cover-letter.txt suggested-reviewers block per the chosen replacement set, then resubmit to the BAUSTMS-PREP-KSPSLQ-001 slot's send-ready PDF. The OJS portal also allows reviewer suggestions to be entered separately from the cover letter.

final_recommendation: REPLACE 2, KEEP 1; revised cover letter recommended before BAustMS submission. Submission still gated on EXPMATH-WITHDRAWAL-KSPSLQ-001 confirmation per the prior chain step.
